name: designing-native-mobile-apps
description: Native mobile UI and UX skills covering iOS Human Interface Guidelines, Android Material 3 guidance, and React Native product design patterns.

interface.shortDescription: Native-feeling iOS, Android, and React Native UI and UX guidance.
interface.longDescription: Includes iOS and Android platform design guidance from ehmo/platform-design-skills plus React Native screen and interaction design guidance from wshobson/agents.
defaultPrompt: Review this iOS-oriented React Native screen for Apple HIG alignment and native feel.
Review this Android screen for Material 3 and Android platform UX issues.
Suggest better React Native UI patterns for a screen that should feel native on both iOS and Android.
